ops.text: Phase 2 RESULT (wf_c1efe9ec-658, 6 move + 5 verify lanes, all opus): 5/6 repos SHIPPED + disk-verified + CI green — cc-context 75f49d94 (plugin 0.29.0; lockstep job deleted; kept plugin/hooks/hooks.json in place — it's the plugin's SessionStart/install-binary manifest, NOT pack content; fixed latent ccx_bin parents[1]→parents[2] fallback bug; pack test 506/506), cc-present 85c693f2 (0.13.0), cc-guides 2f86d9e8 (0.2.0), cc-skills d54b6928 (show 0.2.0 5/5, codex 0.21.0 29/29; foreign codex-CLI hunks skipped cleanly), getaway 84990c08 (1.1.0; fixed CLI_DIR parent-depth after move; pack finally wired). cc-notes CHECK-BACK: concurrent session live mid-feature (compact tracker: NEW plugin/hooks/compact.py + common/redirect/tests edits) on the exact files to move; lane fully reverted (hash-verified zero footprint) and left a turnkey plan (incl. ci.yml manifests-job deletion lines 58-78, plugin 0.12.0→0.13.0). DECISION: wait for their land (option A) — moving first would strand their new compact.py at the dead old path = silent guard loss; monitor for quiescence then re-dispatch. Flagged for the fragment phase: cc-context AGENTS.md fragment needs plugin/hooks→plugin/capt-hook/hooks path bump; getaway fragment .claude/fragments/AGENTS.md/getaway-development* has the stale hooks.json/capt-hook.toml prose; cc-context ci.yml NLP/cc-notes provisioning steps now vestigial (follow-up candidate). Phase 3 sweep starting (config deletion orthogonal to the cc-notes pack move).
